description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pegasus cpp Lint and Unit Test that runs on every pull request to specific branches and paths, and also allows manual triggering. The workflow consists of two jobs: Lint and Test. The Lint job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with apache/pegasus:clang-format-3.9 image, checks out the code, and runs clang-format. The Test job depends on Lint, runs on an ubuntu-latest container with apache/pegasus:thirdparties-bin-ubuntu1804 image, checks out the code, unpacks prebuilt third-parties, compiles, packages server and tools, and runs unit tests.
